title: Balance Beam Bandits
short_description: Read the raccoons' balance clues, then chase down the escaping bandit carrying the correct sack before it vanishes into the bushes.
description: The raccoon bandits weighed the whole market's fruit on their secret balance scales — then bolted with the loot! Read their scale notes, work out the answer, and chase down the escaping bandit carrying the right sack before it disappears into the bushes. Grab the wrong one and the scale tips over with a CLANG. It's a real-time chase that hides pre-algebra deduction inside a fruit heist: work out which fruit is heavier, how many small ones balance a big one, and chain two scales together. Grade bands ramp from simple heavier-or-lighter comparisons, to counting how many balance the pan, to two-scale substitution brain-benders, and the bandits run faster every round. A free online logical reasoning and balance-scale game for kids in grades 1–5, with quick-grab and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the escaping bandit carrying the correct sack (the answer to the balance clues) before it disappears into the bushes.
